content.scenarioHint: 在晨会上，你想询问同事关于当前项目的进展，以便了解是否需要协调资源或调整计划。
content.speakerText: How's the project tracking going this week?
expectedAnswers: We're on track—completed the data analysis and now reviewing the visuals.
Almost done with phase two; just waiting on final approvals from QA.
A bit behind schedule due to a delay in feedback, but we're catching up.
Good progress! We’ve hit all our milestones so far.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确询问了项目进展状态
语言准确性：语法和时态使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合职场晨会的口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 project, progress, tracking, week 等相关关键词

expectedAnswers: We’ve onboarded 3 out of 5 new hires—training wraps up Friday.
All new members are set up with access; we’re doing orientation this afternoon.
Progress is steady—I’ve scheduled their first team sync for tomorrow.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确说明了当前状态和下一步计划
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了职场高频词（onboarded, orientation, sync）
表达自然度：表达简洁有力，符合晨会快速汇报风格
关键词覆盖：是否包含人数、时间节点、关键动作（如 scheduled, wraps up）
